tokens.name: neutral
tokens.semanticMeaning: Neutral base family for surfaces, text, and borders

do: Assign a low-chroma or achromatic palette as the neutral role
never: Use a saturated palette as neutral

tokens.description: Neutral base family for surfaces, text, and borders. Light: zinc-500.
